mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defect
AND def_usage = 'Y'
AND TO_CHAR(def_type_id) LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND UPPER(def_type_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')
AND ( TO_CHAR(def_type_id) LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR UPPER(def_type_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, D.* FROM ( SELECT def_type_id AS defTypeId, def_type_name AS defTypeName, def_standard_action AS defStandardAction FROM defect
AND def_usage = 'Y'
AND TO_CHAR(def_type_id) LIKE '%' || #{defDTO.searchKeyword} || '%'
AND UPPER(def_type_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{defDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')
AND ( TO_CHAR(def_type_id) LIKE '%' || #{defDTO.searchKeyword} || '%' OR UPPER(def_type_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{defDTO.searchKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY def_type_id DESC ) D ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
SELECT def_type_id AS defTypeId, def_type_name AS defTypeName, def_standard_action AS defStandardAction, def_usage AS defUsage FROM defect WHERE def_type_id = #{value} AND def_usage = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO defect ( def_type_id, def_type_name, def_standard_action, def_usage ) VALUES ( 'DEF' || DEF_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{defTypeName}, #{defStandardAction}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE defect SET def_usage = 'N' WHERE def_type_id = #{value} AND def_usage = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM def_log WHERE dlog_def = #{value} and dlog_usage = 'Y'
SELECT NVL(SUM(dl.dlog_qty), 0) FROM def_log dl WHERE dl.dlog_def = #{value} and dlog_usage = 'Y'

SELECT TO_CHAR(M.month_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS trendDate, NVL(D.trendCnt, 0) AS trendCnt FROM ( SELECT ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5) AS month_date FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -4) AS month_date FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -3) AS month_date FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -2) AS month_date FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1) AS month_date FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AS month_date FROM dual ) M LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(qc.qc_date, 'MM') AS trendMonth, SUM(dl.dlog_qty) AS trendCnt FROM def_log dl JOIN qc qc ON dl.dlog_qcid = qc.qc_id WHERE dl.dlog_def = #{value} AND dl.dlog_usage = 'Y' AND qc.qc_usage = 'Y' AND qc.qc_date IS NOT NULL AND qc.qc_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5) AND qc.qc_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) GROUP BY TRUNC(qc.qc_date, 'MM') ) D ON M.month_date = D.trendMonth ORDER BY M.month_date

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, H.* FROM ( SELECT dl.dlog_id AS dlogId, dl.dlog_qcid AS qcId, dl.dlog_def AS defTypeId, dl.dlog_qty AS defCnt, dl.dlog_action AS dlogAction, dl.dlog_dispose AS dlogDispose, TO_CHAR(qc.qc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS qcDate FROM def_log dl LEFT JOIN qc qc ON dl.dlog_qcid = qc.qc_id WHERE dl.dlog_def = #{defTypeId} AND dl.dlog_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY qc.qc_date DESC, dl.dlog_id DESC ) H ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
